texto: The problem of how we finance the welfare state should not obscure a separate issue: if each person thinks he has an inalienable right to welfare, no matter what happens to the world, that's not equity, it's just creating a society where you can't ask anything of people.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Jacques Delors sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “The problem of how we finance the welfare state should not obscure a separate issue: if each pers…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, politics, society, útil em momentos de society e world.
